top_findings.title: Standings & statistics double-count overlapping Brasileirao seasons
top_findings.evidence: internal/loader/loader.go:156,264 map both Brasileirao_Matches.csv and novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv to "Brasileirao Serie A"; 2019 is a full 380-match season in BOTH files; internal/query/query.go:288 GetStandings and :370 GetStatistics do not deduplicate (unlike FindMatches at query.go:158), so 2003-2019 Brasileirao points and total_matches are ~doubled.
top_findings.suggestion: Deduplicate matches by date+home+away+competition at load time or in the standings/statistics aggregation, reusing the FindMatches key.
